title: Connection refused on localhost for n8n in Docker
symptom: When trying to connect to n8n running in Docker, the error 'localhost refused to connect' appears. This prevents access to the n8n interface.
not_this_if: Using a different host or IP address
root_cause: The default port for n8n in Docker is 5678, but if it's not correctly mapped or if another service is using that port, the connection will be refused. Changing the port to one that is available can resolve this issue.
fix_steps: Open your Docker configuration for n8n
Change the port mapping from 5678 to 32769
agent_instruction: Change the port mapping in your Docker configuration to 32769 and restart the container.
